output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?party(SUM(IF(?gender = wd:Q6581072 , 1 , 0)) AS ?femaleCount)(COUNT(?mk) AS ?totalCount)((SUM(IF(?gender = wd:Q6581072 , 1 , 0)) * 100.0 / COUNT(?mk)) AS ?percentage) WHERE {
  ?mk p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q6771280 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
  ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(?start <= "2009-02-24" ^^ xsd:date && ?end >= "2006-04-17" ^^ xsd:date)
  .
  ?mk wdt:P102 ?party .
  ?mk wdt:P21 ?gender .
}
GROUP BY ?party
